Final closing approval after the provider-accuracy delta was accepted and the production build, strict TypeScript check, complete coverage, and migration evidence passed against the final canonical companion.
Re-acceptance with the Trust 1.1.1 and SpecSync 5.1.1 pins; canonical deltas were already integrated and were not replayed.
